checks.summary: 50/50 focused article, filter, analysis, and discovery tests passed

Full suite: 359 tests, 283 pass, 76 fail. Failing suites are Keyword Controller, Project Controller, Subject Category, Author service, journal/issue controller tests with pre-existing DB-mock and sandbox issues (Database connection lost/unavailable, mock redefine, stale expectations). None reference articleFilter, institutionId, topicId, or buildArticleFilter; institution/topic filter changes confirmed not the source of these failures.

notes: No schema migration, production write, commit, or push was performed.
Existing dirty/staged repo work from previous Paper VN sprints was preserved.
Institution filter uses exact-year EXISTS predicate (Author_Article -> Author -> Institution_Author(year=publication_year) -> Institution), never last_known_institution.
Topic filter uses (primary_topic = $N OR EXISTS Sub_Topic match on $N) with a single reused placeholder, avoiding double-binding and avoiding row duplication via EXISTS.
institutionId flows into articleAnalysis.service.js buildAnalysisFilter() automatically via its ...filterParams spread into buildArticleFilter(); no separate code change was needed there.
Smoke scripts were ad hoc and deleted after use; not part of the committed deliverable.
